Motion Under Evidence Code 1043 Et Seq. And Pitchess To Inspect Defendant Peace Officers Records
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF LINDA CHEN'S Motion Under Evidence Code 1043 Et Seq. And Pitchess To Inspect Defendant Peace Officers Records as to defendant Avery Parker is DENIED. Plaintiff fails to make the required showing of good cause to warrant discovery of the records she seeks. Written order is signed and filed in open court. Proposed judgment rejected; not appropriate at this time.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not reported. (D302)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Miles B. Cooper, of Emison Hullverson LLP, Tel. 415.434.2111, for plaintiffs;
Lisa B. Berkowitz, of Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendants CCSF.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court required parties to appear. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, OFFICER AVERY PARKER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained as to punitive damages and intentional infliction of emotional distress claims. The Court takes the FEHA cause of action under submission. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Denise Doucette, CSR No. 5963; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
